Bash(export SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN="sbp_f0b83a98a791a02202ec07242a259526e330369d"
cd "C:/gerardo/01 SmallSF/MyGraduate"
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request, sys

sql = open\('supabase/setup_all.sql', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)
data = json.dumps\({'query': sql}\).encode\('utf-8'\)

req = urllib.request.Request\(
  'https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/snrxbyabvvmcbhmeewcf/database/query',
  data=data,
  headers={
    'Authorization': 'Bearer sbp_f0b83a98a791a02202ec07242a259526e330369d',
    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
  },
  method='POST'
\)
try:
  res = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
  print\('SUCCESS:', res.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
  print\('ERROR:', e.code, e.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
